sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43420" key="eu)apanthsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐαπαντ-ησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43420.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">affability</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.60</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
